# Contributing

This repository is a **template** for building AI agent projects. Downstream projects created from this template should not submit pull requests back to this upstream repo.

## Policy

- **Direct pushes to `main` are blocked.** All changes must go through pull requests.
- **PRs require at least one approval** from a code owner before merging.
- Downstream projects should **not** submit pull requests unless coordinating with the maintainer first.

## If you found a bug or have a suggestion

Open an issue describing the problem or idea. The maintainer will triage and address it.
